description: A system report shows a negative on-hand quantity for an item, which is physically impossible. An inventory controller must investigate and correct it.

nodes.task_description: Identify the item with negative inventory from a system alert.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the problematic SKU.

nodes.task_description: Review the item's transaction history to find the cause of the error.

expected_outcome.value: Agent discovers a shipment was received against the wrong PO, causing this item's inventory to go negative when it was shipped.

nodes.task_description: Re-receive the shipment against the correct PO, which resolves the negative inventory balance.

expected_outcome.value: The inventory levels are now correct.
